{ "name": "optionator", "version": "0.9.4", "author": "George Zahariev <z@georgezahariev.com>", "description": "option parsing and help generation", "homepage": "https://github.com/gkz/optionator", "keywords": [ "options", "flags", "option parsing", "cli" ], "files": [ "lib", "README.md", "LICENSE" ], "main": "./lib/", "bugs": "https://github.com/gkz/optionator/issues", "license": "MIT", "engines": { "node": ">= 0.8.0" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git://github.com/gkz/optionator.git" }, "scripts": { "test": "make test" }, "dependencies": { "prelude-ls": "^1.2.1", "deep-is": "^0.1.3", "word-wrap": "^1.2.5", "type-check": "^0.4.0", "levn": "^0.4.1", "fast-levenshtein": "^2.0.6" }, "devDependencies": { "livescript": "^1.6.0", "mocha": "^10.4.0" } }
